dataList.name: [Сезон 1] 3★ Guarantee Decaextraction Ticket
dataList.desc: Can be used to perform 10 extractions where one 3★ Identity from [Season 1] is guaranteed to appear.
dataList.flavor: A special ticket with a mark on it. It can extract an Identity from a world of unlikely possibilities with certainty. The paper is fiercely beating и pulsing.

dataList.name: [Сезон 2] 3★ Guarantee Decaextraction Ticket
dataList.desc: Can be used to perform 10 extractions where one 3★ Identity from [Season 2] is guaranteed to appear.
dataList.flavor: A special ticket with a mark on it. It can extract an Identity from a world of unlikely possibilities with certainty. The paper is fiercely beating и pulsing.

dataList.name: [Сезон 3] 3★ Guarantee Decaextraction Ticket
dataList.desc: Can be used to perform 10 extractions where one 3★ Identity from [Season 3] is guaranteed to appear.
dataList.flavor: A special ticket with a mark on it. It can extract an Identity from a world of unlikely possibilities with certainty. The paper is fiercely beating и pulsing.

dataList.name: Светяшке))
dataList.desc: Валюта, которая используется для повышения аптая и тредспинов
dataList.flavor: Светяшке))

dataList.name: Говняный билет с опытом
dataList.desc: Даёт 50 опыта Айдишке
dataList.flavor: Даже представить не могу, в каких условиях эта хуйня может быть использована

dataList.name: Облитый спермой билет с опытом
dataList.desc: Даёт 200 опыта Айдишке
dataList.flavor: Хуёвый конечно билет, но для экономии подойдет

dataList.name: Обоссанный билет с опытом
dataList.desc: Даёт 1000 опыта Айдишке
dataList.flavor: А вот этой хуйнёй уже можно нихуёво вкачаться

dataList.name: Гомосексуальный билет с опытом
dataList.desc: Даёт 3000 опыта Айдишке
dataList.flavor: 50 таких билетиков - и у тебя будет хуй за щекой. Ахуенно же!... В смысле "не"? ТЫ, ЧУРКА ТУПАЯ, БУДЕШЬ СОСАТЬ И ТОЧКА!!!

dataList.name: Говняный бустер уровня
dataList.desc: Увеличивает уровень Айдишки до 10
dataList.flavor: Откуда ты эту хуйню ваще взял

dataList.name: Облитый спермой бустер уровня
dataList.desc: Увеличивает уровень Айдишки до 20
dataList.flavor: Я хуею, откуда оно у тебя?”

dataList.name: Обоссанный бустер уровня
dataList.desc: Увеличивает уровень Айдишки до 30
dataList.flavor: Хуй”

dataList.name: Гомосексуальный бустер уровня
dataList.desc: Увеличивает уровень Айдишки до  40.
dataList.flavor: бля да где ты эту хуйню то спиздил

dataList.name: Протеиновый билетик
dataList.desc: Повышает уровень Айдишки на 40, и Аптай до 4
dataList.flavor: вкусная хуйня, но вродь щас хуй получишь. Если ты это получил - напиши переводчикам, исправим данный текст

dataList.name: Пачка герыча
dataList.desc: Восстанавливает 60 героина при использовании
dataList.flavor: Мощная доза героина

dataList.name: Ящик со Светяшке))
dataList.desc: Откройте, дабы получить от одной до трёх светяшек
dataList.flavor: ехехех Светяшке))

dataList.name: [Season 1] Egoshard Crate
dataList.desc: Open to receive 1-3 Egoshards of random Sinners.
dataList.flavor:
Egoshards were randomly harvested и stored in these boxes. Its contents are a mystery.
Когда you hold one in a quiet place, you can hear small fusses.

dataList.name: [Season 1] Nominable Egoshard Crate
dataList.desc: Open to receive 1-3 Egoshards of a Sinner of choice.
dataList.flavor:
A crate that yields Egoshards of a Sinner you choose.
According to Эпштейн, its contents are determined once a manager makes their decision.

dataList.name: [Season 2] Egoshard Crate
dataList.desc: Open to receive 1-3 Egoshards of random Sinners.

dataList.name: [Season 1] Саня’s Egoshard
dataList.desc: Used for purchasing Саня’s Айдишки, Э.Г.О, и Thread from the Dispenser.
dataList.flavor:
Fleeting moments from any point within the Sinner’s lifetime, condensed в physical form. The shards float in the air.
Possibilities are transient things; they drift in the realm of uncertainty unless seized.

dataList.name: Season 2 [Selected Sinner]’s Egoshard
dataList.desc: 재화 등장 확률 상세 표시용(name 만 번역해주세요)

dataList.name: Въёбано [Гарант]
dataList.desc: 천장 재화 표시용(name 만 번역해주세요)

dataList.name: Bus-modifying Scrap
dataList.desc:
Miscellaneous junk like rusted plates и bolts ripped from the backs of trash crabs.
Could be used for modifying Mephistopheles.

dataList.name: Rare Horseshoe with Bus-modifying Scrap
dataList.desc:
A large horseshoe-shaped item taken from the king trash crab.
It could substitute several pieces of scrap, или so we're told.

dataList.name: Осколошке))
dataList.desc: 자판기 재화 표시용(name 만 번역해주세요)

dataList.name: Trinkets Sack
dataList.desc:
A sack full of trinkets и decorations hastily taken from the Gift Factory.
Донбасс will make good use of these to spruce up the Mephistopheles' interiors.

dataList.name: Huge Trinkets Sack
dataList.desc:
A huge sack filled to the brim with trinkets и decorations from the Gift Factory.
Донбасс will make good use of these to spruce up the Mephistopheles' interiors.

dataList.name: Bloodied Scabbard
dataList.desc:
Used to purchase various rewards from the Касса МакДака menu.

<color=#a16a3b>Those who wield blades in life leave behind bloodied scabbards in death.
The true abode of those who walk the path of blades is their scabbard.</color>

dataList.name: Resentful Scabbard
dataList.desc:
Used to purchase various rewards from the Касса МакДака menu.

<color=#a16a3b>One who wields their blade with deep resentment is called a Demon of the Blade.
Demon of the Blade no longer has need of a scabbard; yet they carry it, as that resentment is tinged with a lingering attachment.</color>

dataList.name: Карманные часы
dataList.desc:
Everyone has their own timepiece, with varying time scales.
Time that goes by quickly. Time that lingers.
The hours are always misaligned.

dataList.name: Набор карманных часов
dataList.desc:
The same destination awaits every timepiece.
The hours finally align когда the hands stop ticking down the seconds, когда one breathes their final lungful of air.

dataList.name: Набор восстановления пассажиров
dataList.desc:
Used to purchase various rewards from the Касса МакДака menu.

<color=#a16a3b>Notice to Cleanup Agents: please collect и store a single passenger's parts in this pack. No matter how difficult it may appear to collect their parts, do note that there is a single strand of vein connecting the passenger's parts together. Imagine you are spinning a yarn ball в shape, и patiently collect them one by one.</color>

dataList.name: Набор восстановления корректировщиков
dataList.desc:
Spawns rarely. Converted to 20 Набор восстановления пассажиров immediately upon acquisition.

<color=#a16a3b>On occasion, you may have to work on passengers equipped with prosthetics.
Please note that even full-body prosthetics do not remove the passenger's brain.
Any prosthetic parts recognized by the brain as the passenger's own body will be connected by veins, so there is no need to worry about mix-и-matching them together.
Remember: blood is thicker than water.</color>

dataList.name: Протеиновый модуль
dataList.desc: Повышает Аптай Айдишки до 4
dataList.flavor: Колоть в вену

dataList.name: Протеиновый модуль Э.Г.О (WAW)
dataList.desc: Повышает Тредспин Э.Г.О до 4 (Используется только на Э.Г.О уровня WAW или ниже)
dataList.flavor: Колоть в вену под действием коррозии (если вены нет - колоть в хуй)

dataList.name: Билетик халявной Айдишки (Сезон 1)
dataList.desc: Используйте это, дабы получить халявную Айдишку первого сезона на выбор
dataList.flavor: халяву люблю пиздец

dataList.name: Билетик халявного Э.Г.О (Сезон 1)
dataList.desc: Используйте это, дабы получить халявное Э.Г.О первого сезона на выбор
dataList.flavor: халяву люблю пиздец

dataList.name: Season 4 Uptie & Threadspinning only Shard (Universal)
dataList.desc: Can be used to Uptie Айдишки и Threadspin Э.Г.О for all Sinners.
dataList.flavor:
A universal shard that can be used to Uptie или Threadspin Айдишки & Э.Г.О for all Sinners.
However, these shards cannot be used to extract Айдишки или Э.Г.О, no matter how many of these shards one collects.
'These shards are products of our research в the omnitransformative nature of Golden Boughs; it can be used to fill any fathoms или worlds of mirrors. Huh? Extractions? Of course not. Its one-size-fits-all-worlds nature would mean that it obviously cannot have been made *for* any specific world, right? - LCA Mirror World Observatorium Department Chief Researcher'

dataList.name: Протеиновый модуль Э.Г.О (HE)
dataList.desc: Повышает Тредспин Э.Г.О до 4 (Используется только на Э.Г.О уровня HE или ниже)
dataList.flavor: Колоть в вену под действием коррозии (если вены нет - колоть в хуй)

dataList.name: Amassed Data
dataList.desc:
Used to purchase various rewards from the Касса МакДака menu.

<color=#a16a3b>Various disorganized и trivial documentation on LCB, Distortions, и the Peccatula are haphazardly scribbled here. These data have been collected by the LCE—messy records of tests, experiments, и research litter the papers.

'It is not the duty of a researcher to organize their findings. That is the assistants' responsibility.'</color>

dataList.name: Classified Data
dataList.desc:
Spawns rarely. Converted to 20 Amassed Data immediately upon acquisition.

<color=#a16a3b>Classified data collected by Hohenheim himself, available for viewing only for LCE's assistant researchers. It contains all kinds of in-depth information about Limbus Company—from each Sinner's personal information(Birthdays, birthplaces, etc.) to analyses on Abnormalities и Distortions contained within the LCE.

'The enumeration of data alone is worthless. What matters is which data connects to which, когда they are unveiled, и how they are put to use. Only then is data transformed в intelligence of worth.' - Anonymous LCA Officer</color>

dataList.name: Билетик халявной Айдишки (Сезон 2)
dataList.desc: Используйте это, дабы получить халявную Айдишку второго сезона сезона на выбор
dataList.flavor: халяву люблю пиздец

dataList.name: Протеиновый билетик №2
dataList.desc: Повышает уровень Айдишки на 50, и Аптай до 4
dataList.flavor: пиздец вкусная хуйня

dataList.name: [Цилиндр с говном Говночистов]
dataList.desc: Используется для покупки ивентовых предметов
dataList.flavor: хз чё все ноют, свиперы легчайшие враги

dataList.name: [Бачок с говном Говночистов]
dataList.desc: Маленький шанс на получение. Конвертируется сразу в 20 цилиндров с говном

dataList.name: Звездяшке)) Токийского Гуля
dataList.desc:
Used in Mirror Dungeons.

<color=#a16a3b>Starlight that can be collected only as long as the Mirror of Immortality remains open. Wish as people might to weave new tales from Starlight, they can only scavenge for what earthbound Starlight there remains—for the stars in the sky are no more.</color>

dataList.name: Представление к Чжи, Йон, Рэн
dataList.desc:
Used to purchase various rewards from the Касса МакДака menu.

<color=#a16a3b>The Wise are unshaken, the Brave are unafraid, и the Benevolent are untroubled. No matter what discipline it may be, to build the pillars of learning upon the three foundations of Zhi, Yong, и Ren is to build a soaring tower. Which summons forth an intriguing question: can not all of education be condensed в Zhi, Yong, и Ren? - Tianji Star(天機星)</color>

dataList.name: Definitely Not A Secret Scroll
dataList.desc:
Spawns rarely. Converted to 20 Представление к Чжи, Йон, Рэн immediately upon acquisition.

<color=#a16a3b>A scroll filled with esoteric knowledge. It allows its readers to rapidly absorb its contents, wisdom или technique, disregarding the basics that must come before the learning. None know yet whether it is the paper that is a Singularity, или the letters that are a Singularity, или the ink that forms them that is a Singularity. This likely matters very little to those who covet this secret scroll. Yet, remember well that food ingested in haste risks sickness и vomiting. Always be acutely aware of your capabilities. - A Certain Master</color>

dataList.name: [Частица Сиборн]
dataList.desc:
Используется для покупки различных наград в меню Обмен на награды.

<color=#a16a3b>Куски плоти Сиборн, собранные для исследовательских целей. Спокойный шум волн слабо доносится сквозь коварный голубой свет.</color>

dataList.name: [Сияющая частица Сиборн]
dataList.desc:
Появляется редко. Немедленно преобразуется в 20 [Частиц Сиборн] при получении.

<color=#a16a3b>Экземпляр Сиборн, собранный для исследовательских целей. Не было колебаний в руке, которая пронзила жизнь, когда-то вызывавшую восхищение у её обладателя. Чтобы развиваться, необходимо погрузиться в неугасимый свет. Это неизбежный шаг.</color>

dataList.name: Звездяшке)) из очка деда Макара
dataList.desc:
Used in Mirror Dungeons.

<color=#a16a3b>Starlight that can be collected only within a fleeting span of time. The gaze is raised to the stars above. The stars beheld then fall, awaiting their gleaning. Harvested и tethered against their will, they are compelled to twinkle и shine, giving rise to new stories.</color>

dataList.name: Говняшке))
dataList.desc: Используется для крафта скинов.

dataList.name: Severed Thread
dataList.desc:
Used to purchase various rewards from the Reward Exchange menu.

<color=#a16a3b>Something has severed this thread, snapping it в strands.
Truly, there is no such thing as an existence in complete homogeneity with another, for slicing a single thread reveals that it is in fact a twine of multiple fibers. Когда a thread is severed, it leaves not two separate threads, but a multitude of frayed strands—from this, we may learn that time indeed не cure all wounds. The passage of time only unravels the frayed strands further, leaving weeping wounds that never хилит.</color>

dataList.name: Severed и Scorched Skein
dataList.desc:
Spawns rarely. Converted to 20 Severed Thread immediately upon acquisition.

<color=#a16a3b>To truly sever a thread, it must be burned, not cut. Keenness is a means insufficient to achieving the total annihilation that burns и melts away even the lingering remnants of an erstwhile connection down to the frayed ends of separated threads. It must be that only with resolute determination и heart can one sever such a connection.

Should these skeins of severed и scorched strings be twined anew, perhaps the resulting new thread can be used to connect hearts once again? I certainly hope so, though there is no way for us to know при this moment.</color>

dataList.name: Протеиновый модуль - прокачка Э.Г.О (ZAYIN)
dataList.desc: Прокачивает эго до 4-го тредспина (только ZAYIN)
dataList.flavor: Зайин эго и так пиздец дешево качать, нахуя мне это гавно

dataList.name: Стекляшке))
dataList.desc:
Пришёл я как-то на забив, надавал боссу пиздюлей, а потом меня намазали маслом и выебали.







Остался доволен.

dataList.name: Photos
dataList.desc:
Used to purchase various rewards from the Reward Exchange menu.

<color=#a16a3b>*snap* The sound of a hammer driving a nail in. But what precisely is being "driven in?" The camera waylays the light of a given moment, then nails it onto rough paper for exhibition. Was the photograph taken as a record или a remembrance? Perhaps a photograph's name ought to change depending on which purpose it is made to serve. After all, beams of light nailed down by a hammer, only to be recorded и never remembered, are pitiable things. Within printed photographs, dead lights scream in despair, burned и blackened. The dead lights, perished screaming where they are nailed, record the smile of someone standing in the photograph.</color>

dataList.name: Photo Bundles
dataList.desc:
Spawns rarely. Converted to 20 Photos immediately upon acquisition.

<color=#a16a3b>'Quite a lot of photographs retrieved here. Oh, did you know? These photos are composed of matter produced by a Distortion, but they remain in existence. Some Distortion byproducts fade away когда the case is resolved, but some don't, even after everything is over. I wonder если this has something to do with the nature of the Distortion. Well, we do know that this Distortion wished to record something и remember it... hence the photographs. Perhaps that's why these photographs are left behind as some kind of "record." This calls for research в exactly what results in the difference in a Distortion's property from another Distortion's. Well, working in LCD will probably give me some insight in due time... though I'd rather not cooperate with LCE.'</color>
